latestPosts.caption:
This is why I always say DREAM BIG. Ask the universe for impossible things. Manifest so boldly that people start thinking you’re crazy… because the universe is listening to every wish you make. 
Today We Ranked No. 2 for Q1 2026 with Sobha Realty, standing on this stage feels unreal. Me and Kirpa Army worked relentlessly to get here, This achievement is a proof that vision, faith, and consistency can turn dreams into reality.
A huge thank you to all our investors, clients, viewers, and supporters who believed in us and encouraged us every step of the way. 🙏 We are here to make history. We are here to build a legacy. Our vision is to become No. 1 in the world — not just in Dubai. 🚀 @kirpa.properties on Top

#KirpaProperties #TopPerformer #Q12026

Dubai is super excited to welcome @thekapscafe_ 🇦🇪☕
Thank you so much @kapilsharma and @ginnichatrath for trusting and believing in Kirpa @kirpa.properties with your big move. My Kirpa Army is truly grateful to be part of the Kaps Café journey.
Stay tuned for the massive launch of Kaps Café 🚀🥳

 📩 manpreet@kirpaproperties.com
📲 WhatsApp: +971543673063

STORY TIME: Four months ago, I had the opportunity to shoot a project video on a helicopter with none other than @rizwan.sajan Mid-air, he asked me a simple yet profound question: “Manpreet, what’s your vision? What do you want to achieve in the future?”

Without hesitation, I told him, “I want to become the next Rizwan Sajan.” He looked at me, smiled, and said something that stuck with me ever since—“Manpreet, I can already see you becoming a very successful developer very soon.”

Fast forward to today, after launching @kirpa.properties I met him again. This time, it wasn’t just a conversation about dreams—it was about progress, about action, about turning visions into reality. Seeing his happiness and pride in my journey so far was a full-circle moment.

This is just the beginning. To everyone out there chasing their dreams—believe, work hard, manifest, and never stop growing. The journey is long, but the destination is worth it. 

#Manifestation #HardWork #KirpaProperties #DreamsToReality

I sat down with @manpreet.kirpa and @jai.kirpa to hear the story behind @kirpa.properties from humble beginnings in their hometown to building one of Dubai’s most promising real estate ventures.

In this episode of The Ugly Truth, we talk about how they manage the business together as husband and wife, balance their roles, navigate challenges, and how their roots shaped their vision and resilience.

A raw, inspiring conversation with insights from the heart of Dubai real estate.

#dubairealestate #dubairealty #salesleadership #theuglytruth #podcast

From planning to allocations, the Raw District launch was a huge success. Proud of the Kirpa team for the hard work, dedication, and seamless execution 

#KirpaProperties #PropertiesinDubai #DubaiProperties #DubaiInvestment #RealEstate #RealEstateDubai #RawDistrict

The entire Kirpa Army showed up today with one mission: securing the best apartments and offices for our clients at the Raw District 2 launch. 💪 Behind today’s success were 20 days of relentless hustle—countless meetings, late nights, market analysis, and educating our clients on the project, the numbers, and the opportunities.
Proud of every single member of the Kirpa Army for their teamwork, dedication, and commitment to putting our clients first. This is what excellence looks like.

Congratulations, team! On to the next one. 🚀

Missed the launch of Raw District Phase 2? Don't worry. Imtiaz is coming up with another exciting project soon. Register your interest with us today and be among the first to know when it launches.

📩 info@kirpaproperties.com
Whatsaap +971543673063 

#KirpaProperties #PropertiesinDubai #DubaiProperties #DubaiInvestment #RealEstate #RealEstateDubai

We're at the launch of Raw District Phase 2, securing unit allocations for our clients. Missed this opportunity? Don't worry, there are more exciting projects coming up.

📩 - manpreet@kirpaproperties.com

Want to invest in premium properties like these in Dubai? DM us and our team will help you explore the right opportunities.
